HGSS.342.0000:
I’m the Fishing Guru’s younger brother.\f
You seem to like fishing.
Am I right, or am I right?\r
People say I have keen eyes! [0200,0000]
HGSS.342.0001:
Yes, yes. Just as I thought!\f
Here, fishing fan!
Take this--it’s a Super Rod.\f
HGSS.342.0002:
Try your hand at fishing wherever there
is water.\f
Remember--you can catch different
Pokémon depending on which Rod you use.
HGSS.342.0003:
Huh?
My own eyes deceived me?
